origin_or_historical_context: Martian; lives in isolation within the Atmosphere Factory.
stable_visual_summary: An elderly Martian with a desiccated, "dried-up" physical appearance. His look is defined by long-term isolation within the Atmosphere Factory, suggesting a weathered and neglected aesthetic consistent with a life of seclusion.
physical_traits: Highly skilled in mental control/telepathy (non-visual trait)
costume_signature: Clothing suggesting long-term seclusion and isolation.
personality: highly skilled in mental control and telepathy
continuity_constraints: Appearance must reflect long-term seclusion within the Atmosphere Factory.
